targets.rawSql:
;WITH unique_records AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Part Type],
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Status]))       AS status_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.])) AS material_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))      AS mc_clean,
        -- ✅ ลบ % ทุกตัวออก ไม่ว่าจะอยู่ตำแหน่งไหน
        LTRIM(RTRIM(
            REPLACE(LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])), '%', '')
        ))                           AS mold_clean
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) != ''
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record]))
                IN (${year:singlequote})
        AND CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS VARCHAR(2))
                IN (${month:singlequote})
),
all_lots AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        mc_clean,
        mold_clean,
        [Identical ID], [QC Member],
        [Year Record],  [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],  [Sequence]
    FROM unique_records
),
ng_lots AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        mc_clean,
        mold_clean,
        [Identical ID], [QC Member],
        [Year Record],  [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],  [Sequence]
    FROM unique_records
    WHERE status_clean = 'NG'
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        a.mc_clean,
        COUNT(*)          AS total_lot,
        COUNT(n.mc_clean) AS ng_lot
    FROM all_lots a
    LEFT JOIN ng_lots n
           ON a.mc_clean        = n.mc_clean
          AND a.[Identical ID]  = n.[Identical ID]
          AND a.[QC Member]     = n.[QC Member]
          AND a.[Year Record]   = n.[Year Record]
          AND a.[Month Record]  = n.[Month Record]
          AND a.[File Run No.]  = n.[File Run No.]
          AND a.[Sequence]      = n.[Sequence]
    GROUP BY a.mc_clean
),
distinct_mold AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT mc_clean, mold_clean
    FROM ng_lots
),
mold_agg AS (
    SELECT
        mc_clean,
        STRING_AGG(mold_clean, ' / ') AS mold_list
    FROM distinct_mold
    GROUP BY mc_clean
)
SELECT
    s.mc_clean                            AS [M/C No.],
    CAST(
        s.ng_lot * 100.0 / NULLIF(s.total_lot, 0)
    AS DECIMAL(5,1))                      AS [NG Rate (%)],
    m.mold_list                           AS [Mold No.]
FROM summary s
LEFT JOIN mold_agg m ON m.mc_clean = s.mc_clean
WHERE s.ng_lot > 0
ORDER BY [NG Rate (%)] DESC

panels.title: MACHINE NG LOT RATE BY M/C

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Month
list.name: month
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT [Year Record] AS __text, [Year Record] AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) != ''
ORDER BY [Year Record];
list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT [Year Record] AS __text, [Year Record] AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) != ''
ORDER BY [Year Record];
